creator: robbelics@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE

I was upgrading this port and initially received this error:

===>  Installing for libcdr01-0.1.5
===>  Checking if libcdr01 already installed
===>   Registering installation for libcdr01-0.1.5
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.4:No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01

===>>> A backup package for libcdr01-0.1.4_13 should
       be located in /usr/ports/packages/portmaster-backup

===>>> Installation of libcdr01-0.1.5 (graphics/libcdr01) failed
===>>> Aborting update

Since the port was uninstalled, I downloaded the distfile again and then got this:

Making install in build
Making install in win32
Making install in inc
Making install in libcdr
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/include/libcdr-0.1/libcdr'
 install  -m 0644 libcdr.h libcdr_api.h CDRDocument.h CMXDocument.h '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/include/libcdr-0.1/libcdr'
Making install in src
Making install in lib
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib'
 /bin/sh ../../libtool   --mode=install /usr/bin/install -c -s  libcdr-0.1.la '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c .libs/libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.5 /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.5
libtool: install: strip --strip-unneeded /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.5
libtool: install: (cd /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib && { ln -s -f libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.5 libcdr-0.1.so.1 || { rm -f libcdr-0.1.so.1 && ln -s libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.5 libcdr-0.1.so.1; }; })
libtool: install: (cd /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib && { ln -s -f libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.5 libcdr-0.1.so || { rm -f libcdr-0.1.so && ln -s libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.5 libcdr-0.1.so; }; })
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c .libs/libcdr-0.1.lai /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libcdr-0.1.la
libtool: warning: remember to run 'libtool --finish /usr/local/lib'
Making install in conv
Making install in raw
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
 STRIPPROG='strip' /bin/sh ../../../libtool   --mode=install /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s cdr2raw cmx2raw '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
libtool: warning: '../../lib/libcdr-0.1.la' has not been installed in '/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s .libs/cdr2raw /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin/cdr2raw
libtool: warning: '../../lib/libcdr-0.1.la' has not been installed in '/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s .libs/cmx2raw /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin/cmx2raw
Making install in svg
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
 STRIPPROG='strip' /bin/sh ../../../libtool   --mode=install /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s cdr2xhtml cmx2xhtml '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
libtool: warning: '../../lib/libcdr-0.1.la' has not been installed in '/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s .libs/cdr2xhtml /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin/cdr2xhtml
libtool: warning: '../../lib/libcdr-0.1.la' has not been installed in '/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s .libs/cmx2xhtml /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin/cmx2xhtml
Making install in text
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
 STRIPPROG='strip' /bin/sh ../../../libtool   --mode=install /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s cdr2text cmx2text '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin'
libtool: warning: '../../lib/libcdr-0.1.la' has not been installed in '/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s .libs/cdr2text /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin/cdr2text
libtool: warning: '../../lib/libcdr-0.1.la' has not been installed in '/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/libcdr-0.1.5/install-sh -c -s .libs/cmx2text /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/bin/cmx2text
Making install in docs
Making install in doxygen
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig'
 install  -m 0644 libcdr-0.1.pc '/usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig'
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for libcdr01-0.1.5
===>  Checking if libcdr01 already installed
===>   Registering installation for libcdr01-0.1.5
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libcdr-0.1.so.1.0.4:No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/libcdr01

===>>> Installation of libcdr01-0.1.5 (graphics/libcdr01) failed
===>>> Aborting update
